source.name: Lab 3.4: Balance flow (fill in the blanks)
source.instructions: **Fill in the blanks to complete the balance flow YAML.** Use the exact words shown in the guidance so the LLM can match user messages about checking balance.
source.text:
Complete the flow that explains how to check balance:

```yaml
flows:
  <<<balance>>>:
    name: account balance help
    description: <<<Explain how to check account balance.>>>
    steps:
      - action: <<<utter_balance>>>
```
source.distractors:
hours
flows
Tell the user their balance.
utter_hours
response
source.guidance: The correct answers are: **balance** (flow name), **Explain how to check account balance.** (description the LLM uses to match), **utter_balance** (the response action). You will add this flow to your project in the next step.
